title: Investigate realworld diff divergences
description:
## Epic: Investigate realworld diff divergences

Track progress on achieving parity between Go and C tree-sitter parser output on realworld source files.

### Progress
- Started at 12 file-level divergences across C (5), C++ (3), Perl (2), Go (1), Redis (1)
- Now at 2 file-level divergences: curl.h, descriptor.h

### Closed
- ql0.1: Superseded by ql0.5
- ql0.3: Perl divergences fixed by main loop restructure
- ql0.5: Main loop restructure (advance all versions before condensing)

### Open
- ql0.2: 2 remaining C/C++ header divergences (context-dependent error recovery)
- ql0.4: Go generics (kuberuntime_manager.go) — passes now, monitoring

### Key Commits
- dd0d2f6: doReduce/betterVersionExists alignment, MISSING normalization
- 987e4ee: regression test for missing #endif
- 3bf028d: main loop restructure
- 4a6fb26: condenseStack unconditional (reviewer P1 fix)
